DECLARATION OF EDWARD HONG IN SUPPORT OF PLAINTIFFS APPLICATION FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER AND ORDER FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF ATTACHMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 61344290) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KONOHA AD GROUP LLC

LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFF KONOHA AD GROUP LLC'S APPLICATION FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER AND ORDER FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF ATTACHMENT IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO BEING REFILED BASED ON SUFFICIENT EVIDENTIARY SUPPORT. THE SOLE FACTUAL SUPPORT FOR THE APPLICATION IS THE DECLARATION OF EDWARD HONG. MR. HONG'S DECLARATION FAILS TO SHOW THAT KONOHA SATISFIED ITS CONTRACTUAL OBLIGATIONS TO DEFENDANT REVIVE NUTRA LLC. THE DECLARATION IS SILENT AS TO ANY CONTRACT PERFORMANCE BY KONOHA OTHER THAN THE ISSUANCE OF INVOICES TO REVIVE. THERE IS NO INDICATION IN THE DECLARATION OR THE INVOICES WHAT GOODS OR SERVICES WERE PROVIDED TO REVIVE FOR THE AMOUNTS ASSERTED IN THE INVOICES. MR. HONG'S DECLARATION AND THE INVOICES ARE INSUFFICIENT TO SUPPORT THE REQUIRED FINDING THAT KONOHA HAS SHOWN THE PROBABLE VALIDITY OF ITS CLAIM. WRITTEN ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN: J. RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: REYES F. HUNTER, CSR NO. 6576, E-MAIL: RHUNTER@SFTC.ORG (L&M302)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-23-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order And Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Dec-08-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Robert E. White of the law offices of Robert E. White (415-788-6151) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

The cause is argued and submitted by the moving party as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF KONOHA AD GROUP LLC's Application For Right To Attach Order And Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment is denied without prejudice to being refiled based on sufficient evidentiary support. The sole factual support for the application is the declaration of Edward Hong. Mr. Hong's declaration fails to show that Konoha satisfied its contractual obligations to defendant Revive Nutra LLC. The declaration is silent as to any contract performance by Konoha other than the issuance of invoices to Revive. There is no indication in the declaration or the invoices what goods or services were provided to Revive for the amounts asserted in the invoices. Mr. Hong's declaration and the invoices are insufficient to support the required finding that Konoha has shown the probable validity of its claim. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR No. 6576, e-mail: rhunter@sftc.org (L&M302)
